feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >still best friends with my ex wife >visit France multiple times a year to see h…

Understand that her ex wife is very well-born. I won't arrive there to be

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Was the GameCube considered a failure?
entry.content: I was listening to an old episode of GameSpot's Hot Spot podcast from 10/26/2005. They were reading an article about Nintendo basically admitting that the GameCube massively underperformed. The tone was weird, you had Jeff Gerstmann laughing at the host for going all in on the GameCube at the start of that generation. They were suggesting that Nintendo might pivot to being a game only publisher on consoles. Was it the success of the DS and the Wii that sort of smoothed over the money side of the

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /osc/ Object Show Community General #70
entry.content: Clockcest Edition! Previous: >>83177992 BFDIE Full Season: https://youtu.be/2andF8GEmC8 > What are Object Shows? Object Shows are web animations unfortunately lacking in completion with characters based on everyday items. They often compete in challenges with humor, drama, and quirky personalities. More: https://tvtropes.org/pmwiki/pmwiki. php/Main/ObjectShows > Notable Shows: >Battle for Dream Island The one that started it all! A competition between inanimate, anthropomorphic objects, for a gr

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8376 Gadget Head Edition Previous Thread: >>83410031 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profil

entry.title: /int/ International: >I just learned that French not only don't have a separate word for husband and …
entry.content: >I just learned that French not only don't have a separate word for husband and wife (they just say "my man/woman"), but they also don't have a separate word for relatives, but just use "parent" for male relative, and "parente" for female relative Why are they like this? Isn't it good to be precise instead of muddling everything? French seems to just reuse words instead of coming up with new ones.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Slow Cancellation of the Future: Why Mark Fisher Believed Music Innovation Stalled
entry.content: If you look at the landscape of 21st-century music, a strange paradox emerges. We have more access to the entirety of recorded human history than ever before, yet our current sonic era feels haunted by the past. In his seminal 2014 book Ghosts of My Life, cultural theorist Mark Fisher articulated a haunting thesis: music innovation has effectively ceased. Borrowing a phrase from Italian philosopher Franco "Bifo" Berardi, Fisher called this phenomenon "the slow cancellation of the future." Here i

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I've been having this problem all my life, my family doesn't seem to understand …
entry.content: I've been having this problem all my life, my family doesn't seem to understand how electricity works. They don't understand that rechargeable batteries put out a lower voltage than regular batteries, meaning that they won't work for many things such as digital cameras, etc. They also don't seem to understand that you can't just leave them on the charger, you have to take them off when they are full, otherwise the battery is ruined and unsuitable for use in even a television remote. Finally, the

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Help me my dudes, I'm falling to the dark side
entry.content: It's time for me to replace my DD, after 8 years. With gas prices being what they are, petrol or even diesel isn't an option anymore (and being an yuropean, we are taxed to hell anyway). Because the wife was raving about "how cool they are" today I booked a test drive with a Tesla Model 3 RWD long range. Never even sat in one before. I was prepared to hate it... And I loved it. >Electric is shit The instant power was amazing to experience, and the silence is perfect for a DD. I drove it for 30 m

entry.title: /g/ Technology: good tablets still available?
entry.content: Let's talk about good tablets for reading comics. My good old tablet is dying, a side of its screen has started to flicker for weeks. Well, it's from 2014, time to let it go I guess. But with that chip shortage fuckery, and search engines that give only incoherent results, it's a pain to find one. Are there good tablets still available right now? What models do you know? Required: - 4:3 or 7:5 ratio screen. No widescreen. - a microSD slot What size do you think is best for comics? Mine (iFive Mi

entry.content: check if you are infected NOW 1933 packages and counting #!/usr/bin/env bash # Pulls the live package list from the official Arch Linux HedgeDoc note. LIST_URL="https://md.archlinux.org/ s/SxbqukK6IA" echo "Fetching infected package list..." raw=$(curl -fsSL "$LIST_URL") || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch $LIST_URL"; exit 1; } # Extract lines that look like package names only (lowercase, digits, dots, plus, underscore, hyphen) # Strips HTML, blank lines, comments, and anything that doesn't match

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why did we stray away from free functions? everyhting becomes a mess when you st…
entry.content: why did we stray away from free functions? everyhting becomes a mess when you structure code using objects. you don't need anything more than free functions, modules and plain structs

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Bedroom PC habits
entry.content: How to retrain myself so that I am able to focus and work/study on my bedroom's desk/PC? I can do that just fine when I'm in my office at uni or at a library but now that summer is approaching and/or when wanting to study on weekends it becomes more difficult. Even if I have all the motivation to study, upon sitting on my home desk all I want to do is doomscroll on youtube and watch porn. It's unfortunate because I've genuinely setup my desk as a really comfy study place but to no avail. Hard mo

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why do you hate; >Invincible >The boys >Smiling friends >Digital circus >Backroo…
entry.content: Why do you hate; >Invincible >The boys >Smiling friends >Digital circus >Backrooms >Iron lung ? Does the concept of zoomGODS developing their own culture and media upset you somehow? Perhaps it the idea that these things are good, new, and that enough time has passed for game of thrones, suicide squad and the general war on terror period of media to be considered antiquated and boring that disturbs you? Is it, perhaps, that your hatred of these things is a denial of death, that you and the thing

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I am trying to top off my cars AC system. 2014 Camry. I bought a can of R134a. C…
entry.content: I am trying to top off my cars AC system. 2014 Camry. I bought a can of R134a. Currently its blowing cold air about 20% of the time. I do not see any leaks I hooked up one of those Amazon AC pressure gauge filler thingy to the LOW side, and its reading 90PSI. It should be 45PSI max. I did not puncture the can yet. I ran the car for a bit, the pressure did not go down. is the gauge broken or am I doing something wrong?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Propaganda Themes in Movies/TV
entry.content: Every movie has to normalize/include: -Suicide -Drug Use -The Bad Guy is Actually Good -The Good Guy is Actually Bad -Criminal behavior, including stealing and murdering, is actually good -Sodomy is good -Race mixing is good -Blasphemy and Heresy (like the frequent use of the word “Gods” all the time and always showing false objects of worship) -Mocking Christianity/Islam -Premarital sex and intimacy -Degenerate sex -Pedophilia is good -Jews are good -Arabs are Bad -Muslims are Bad -Reading is B

entry.content: >Get bullied so badly as a kid it puts you in hospital >Escape into books >Read 8hrs a day >Teach yourself programming >Sell a video game at 12 >Leave South Africa >Sleep on couches >Work odd jobs >Get into America >Build a startup >Cant afford apt., sleep at office >Shower at the Y >Drill floor for cable access to internet provider beneath. >Get fired from your own company >Start over >Build another company >Merge it into PayPal >Get removed as CEO >Your company gets acquired >Walk away with ne

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Need recommendations for: A solid 2.1 audio DAC/speaker setup (+sub) for a lapt…
entry.content: Need recommendations for: A solid 2.1 audio DAC/speaker setup (+sub) for a laptop (new thinkpad) running Linux. Use case: hobby room music and video. Doesn't need to be fancy, but I'm fairly picky on sound quality. My main PC is running a super old logitech Z5500 setup which is amazingly good. But I have absolutely no idea what's comparable these days.

entry.content: my parents are complete shit heads and ruined my life at an early age, i never had a proper chance of developing into a normal well-adjusted human being, i was so taken by the fantasy of being accepted by my peers (not happening because i was, and am, an autistic fuck up) that i never really knew who i was "supposed" to be, i've never had a real personality, more like a composite personality based on all the "friends" i've had in my life, and my cousin, who i looked up to, he ended up ruining hi

A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.content: You know I had to do it to 'Em. this all stemmed from a delusion born out of contempt over some person I’ve never spoken a word to. I can’t even make things better for myself yet i was trying to convince myself anything i did could ever have an impact in the grand scheme of things. Pity and savior complexes are only laughable anyways and anything built on either of the 2 is inevitably destined for ruin in the first place. You can say this and that but it’ll always be more to me than to you. I ha

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The singular and unrelenting reiteration of such ideas as “all there is is Being…
entry.content: The singular and unrelenting reiteration of such ideas as “all there is is Being", “everything is the expression of Being” or “there is no one” are an arid and simplistic form of communication. It doesn't address or illuminate the dream seeker’s apparent dilemma and it obviously ignores the primary energetic essence of the implicit aliveness of simply Being. To continuously say that being awake or being asleep is not relevant because “Being is all there is” is like telling a blind person that it

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump Team Scrambles to Block Cameras in Kennedy Center Humiliation
entry.content: https://www.thedailybeast.com/trump -team-scrambles-to-block-cameras-in -kennedy-center-humiliation/ The long-awaited removal of Donald Trump’s name from the Kennedy Center was shielded from public view in an apparent bid to soften the blow for the 79-year-old president. In the early hours of Saturday, workers began removing Trump’s name from the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts facade, following a ruling by U.S. District Judge Casey Cooper that the name change was unlawful. The re
